properties.property: INSERT INTO td_abac_policy ( policy_id, policy_name, subject_condition, resource_condition, action_condition, environment_condition, effect, priority, created_time ) VALUES ( #[policyId], #[policyName], #[subjectCondition], #[resourceCondition], #[actionCondition], #[environmentCondition], #[effect], #[priority], #[createdTime] )

UPDATE td_abac_policy SET policy_name = #[policyName], subject_condition = #[subjectCondition], resource_condition = #[resourceCondition], action_condition = #[actionCondition], environment_condition = #[environmentCondition], effect = #[effect], priority = #[priority] WHERE policy_id = #[policyId]
SELECT * FROM td_abac_policy ORDER BY priority DESC, created_time DESC
